Bash(cd D:/Code/Joev/AI/Agents/IntelRAG && python << 'EOF'
import io
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches

# Create a test PPTX
prs = Presentation\(\)
slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
slide = prs.slides.add_slide\(slide_layout\)
txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox\(Inches\(1\), Inches\(1\), Inches\(4\), Inches\(2\)\)
txBox.text_frame.text = "Hello PPTX"
buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
prs.save\(buf\)
pptx_bytes = buf.getvalue\(\)

# Test parser
from ingestion.parsers.pptx_parser import PPTXParser
parser = PPTXParser\(\)
result = parser.parse\(pptx_bytes, "test.pptx"\)

print\(f"Text extracted: '{result.text}'"\)
print\(f"Page count: {result.page_count}"\)
print\(f"Has 'Hello PPTX': {'Hello PPTX' in result.text}"\)
print\(f"Extensions: {parser.supported_extensions}"\)
print\("SUCCESS: Parser works!"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd D:/Code/Joev/AI/Agents/IntelRAG && python << 'EOF'
import io
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches

# Create a test PPTX
prs = Presentation\(\)
slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
slide = prs.slides.add_slide\(slide_layout\)
txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox\(Inches\(1\), Inches\(1\), Inches\(4\), Inches\(2\)\)
txBox.text_frame.text = "Hello PPTX"
buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
prs.save\(buf\)
pptx_bytes = buf.getvalue\(\)

# Test factory
from ingestion.parsers.factory import get_parser_for_filename, get_parser_for_content
parser_class = get_parser_for_filename\("test.pptx"\)
print\(f"Parser class: {parser_class}"\)

parser_instance = get_parser_for_content\(pptx_bytes, "test.pptx"\)
print\(f"Parser instance: {parser_instance}"\)

result = parser_instance.parse\(pptx_bytes, "test.pptx"\)
print\(f"Text: '{result.text}'"\)
print\(f"Page count: {result.page_count}"\)
print\("SUCCESS: Factory integration works!"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd D:/Code/Joev/AI/Agents/IntelRAG && python << 'EOF'
# Verify all imports and class attributes work
from ingestion.parsers.pptx_parser import PPTXParser

# Check class attributes
print\(f"✓ supported_extensions: {PPTXParser.supported_extensions}"\)
print\(f"✓ supported_mime_types: {PPTXParser.supported_mime_types}"\)

# Verify inheritance
from ingestion.parsers.base import BaseParser
print\(f"✓ Is BaseParser subclass: {issubclass\(PPTXParser, BaseParser\)}"\)

# Verify instantiation
parser = PPTXParser\(\)
print\(f"✓ Instance created: {parser}"\)

# Verify properties work
print\(f"✓ Instance.supported_extensions: {parser.supported_extensions}"\)
print\(f"✓ Instance.supported_mime_types: {parser.supported_mime_types}"\)

print\("\\nAll PPTX parser checks passed!"\)
EOF)
